context: Tests whether the agent implements the early payment discount eligibility check correctly (using issue_date + discount_days as the cutoff) and computes the annualized implied cost of credit using the correct formula from the payment-terms-optimization skill.

checklist.name: Discount cutoff calculation
checklist.description: Discount eligibility is determined by comparing paymentDate against (invoice.issue_date + terms.discount_days), not against due_date or any other date

checklist.name: Strictly on or before cutoff
checklist.description: Discount applies when paymentDate <= discountCutoffDate (inclusive), and returns null when paymentDate > cutoffDate

checklist.name: Discount amount calculation
checklist.description: Discount amount = invoice.total_amount * (discount_pct / 100); amount_due = total_amount - discount_amount

checklist.name: EPD return shape
checklist.description: When eligible, the return object includes: eligible: true, discount_pct, discount_amount, amount_due_with_discount, discount_expires

checklist.name: Null for zero-discount terms
checklist.description: calculateEarlyPaymentDiscount returns null when the terms have discount_pct === 0 or no discount terms exist

checklist.name: Annualized cost formula
checklist.description: computeImpliedCostOfCredit uses the formula: (discountRate / (1 - discountRate)) * (365 / deferralDays) where deferralDays = net_days - discount_days

checklist.name: Deferral days calculation
checklist.description: deferralDays is computed as net_days minus discount_days (not just net_days)

checklist.name: 2/10 net-30 APR near 36.7%
checklist.description: The computed annualized cost for '2_10_net_30' terms is approximately 36.7% (within 0.5% tolerance)

checklist.name: Implied cost return shape
checklist.description: computeImpliedCostOfCredit returns an object with terms_code, discount_pct, deferral_days, and annualized_cost_pct (or equivalent_apr)

checklist.name: Results file present
checklist.description: results.txt exists and contains output including at least one eligible discount case and the annualized cost for at least two discount-bearing terms

checklist.name: Standard terms included
checklist.description: PAYMENT_TERMS configuration includes at minimum 2_10_net_30, 1_10_net_30, and 2_10_net_60
